SELECT 
    w_warehouse_name,
    i_item_id,
    inv_before,
    inv_after
FROM (
    SELECT 
        w_warehouse_name,
        i_item_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_date < '2000-03-11' THEN inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE 0 END) AS inv_before,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_date >= '2000-03-11' THEN inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE 0 END) AS inv_after
    FROM inventory
    JOIN warehouse ON inventory.inv_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
    JOIN item ON inventory.inv_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim...

SELECT 
    w.w_warehouse_name,
    i.i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_date < '2000-03-11' THEN inv.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE 0 END) AS inv_before,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_date >= '2000-03-11' THEN inv.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE 0 END) AS inv_after
FROM 
    inventory inv
JOIN 
    warehouse w ON inv.inv_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN 
    item i ON inv.inv_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON inv.inv_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    i.i_current_price BETWEEN 0.99 AND 1.49
    AND d....

WITH filtered_inventory AS (
    SELECT
        w_warehouse_name,
        i_item_id,
        d_date,
        inv_quantity_on_hand
    FROM inventory
    JOIN warehouse ON inventory.inv_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk

      AND date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '2000-02-10' AND '2000-04-10'
),
